name: Single filer at very high income
description: Very high earner at €500,000 in Spain - in top IRPF bracket

sources.description: Verified using Python script implementing official IRPF calculation per Ley 35/2006
sources.verification_method: Python script verify_es_2026.py implementing tax credit method per Ley 35/2006 Articles 56-57
sources.notes: IRPF: 47% on income above €300k. Tax on (Gross - SS) minus tax on mínimo personal €5,550. SS: capped at €3,978.94. Tax credit: €1,054.50. Solidarity on €438,785.60 excess = €1,042.68. CORRECTED 2026-03-07.
